user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to view candidates ready to have interviews scheduled with their current round status, so that I can plan the next interview
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Schedule Interview screen; When the list loads; Then candidates with Scheduled Interview statuses are shown with all documented columns

user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to schedule mass interviews for multiple candidates at once, so that I can efficiently arrange interviews across the pipeline
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Schedule Interview screen; When I click Schedule Mass Interviews; Then I can schedule interviews for the selected candidates

user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to search candidates by name, so that I can quickly find a candidate to schedule an interview for
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Schedule Interview screen; When I enter a candidate name and search; Then only matching candidates are listed

user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to page through the candidate list, so that I can review all 52 candidates across pages
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Schedule Interview screen; When there are more than 10 candidates; Then pagination controls allow moving to next and last pages

user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to refresh the list, so that I see the latest interview scheduling statuses
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Schedule Interview screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with current records
